name: wiki-article-footer
description: Bottom-of-article surface: category tags, references/citations section, and an edit-on-github link. Separates editorial metadata from article body.
html:
Categories

  • {{category-name}}

References

  1. {{citation-text}}
Edit on GitHub

variants.name: no-references
variants.description: Categories + edit link; references section omitted.

aria: Two <section> elements each with aria-labelledby pointing to their visible <h2>. References use <ol> with id='ref-N' for in-article back-links (<a href='#ref-N'>). Edit link: rel=noopener + target=_blank with visually hidden '(opens in new tab)' text for SR.
